description.ko: 음향 주파수를 역동적이고 고동치는 기하학적 풍경으로 변환하는 몰입형 디지털 아트 경험입니다.
description.en: An immersive digital art experience that translates acoustic frequencies into dynamic, pulsating geometric landscapes.

prompt: Cinematic sound visualization of ECHO-0, glowing sound waves turning into 3D geometric structures, neon blue and deep violet color palette, high-tech aesthetic, futuristic digital audio interface, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, abstract data representation.
